title: Crayon template marker (.crayon/template.json)
description: Present ONLY in a pre-instantiation template seed (a GitHub template repo). It declares 'template mode': the seed's `.md` frontmatter and `.crayon/manifest.json` carry no real `docId` bindings (the seed is bound to no Drive folder), so `crayon check`/doctor skip the docId-binding rules. Instantiating the template (extension 'New from template' → generate-from-template → first-import) mints fresh docIds for every file, drops this marker, and yields a schema-valid LIVE repo. frontmatter.schema.json and manifest.schema.json describe that live, instantiated shape.

title.description: Human-readable name shown in the extension's 'New from template' picker.

description.description: Short description of what this template seeds (shown in the picker).
